_contextSnippet: Of the surviving animals, 8 mice with initial tumor reduction were found later to have tumor regrowth (partial), and 1 mouse was cured as determined by absence of tumor after 3 weeks
details: When implanted subcutaneously in C57BL6 mice and treated with C. novyi-NT spores, 8 out of 9 surviving mice had tumor regrowth (partial response) and 1 mouse was cured (complete response)
